---
title: "Exam Timer"
date: 2026-04-28
description: "A clock for exam proctoring."
categories: ["javascript", "school"]
page-layout: custom
title-block-banner: false
navbar: false
title-block-style: none
include-in-header:
  - text: <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/marked/12.0.0/marked.min.js"></script>
  - text:  <script src="exam_timer.js" defer></script>
format:
  html:
    template-partials:
      - title-block.html
    css: exam_timer.css
comments: false
---

<!-- This app was mostly vibecoded by Claude. -->
```{=html}
<section id="setup">
    <div class="setup-card">
        <h1>Exam Timer</h1>

        <div class="row-2">
            <div>
                <label class="setup-label" for="course">Exam name</label>
                <input type="text" id="course" placeholder="e.g. ECON 101 Final Exam" />
            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="setup-label" for="professor">Professor</label>
                <input type="text" id="professor" placeholder="e.g. Henry Stern" />
            </div>
        </div>

        <label class="setup-label" for="duration">Exam length (minutes)</label>
        <input type="number" id="duration" min="1" max="480" value=90 />

        <label class="setup-label" for="instructions">Start instructions</label>
        <textarea id="instructions">
1. You should have **only** your pencils, calculator and student ID at your desk.
2. All unauthorized electronic devices should be turned off and stored in your bag.
3. Your bag should be at the front of the room.
4. Raise your hand when you are finished or if you need permission to leave your desk.
</textarea>

        <label class="setup-label" for="end-instructions">End instructions</label>
        <textarea id="end-instructions">
Remain seated until your exam has been collected.
</textarea>

        <button class="btn-launch" onclick="launchTimer()">Launch Timer →</button>
    </div>
</section>

<section id="timer-screen">

    <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetTimer()">← Reset</button>

    <div class="clock-block">
        <div id="clock-display">
            <span id="time-hm">00:00</span><span id="time-sec">:00</span><span id="ampm">AM</span>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="meta-row">
        <span id="meta-date">—</span>
        <span class="sep">|</span>
        <span id="meta-course"></span>
        <span class="sep">|</span>
        <span id="meta-prof"></span>
    </div>

    <hr class="h-rule" />

    <div class="countdown-block">
        <button class="btn-start" id="start-btn" onclick="startExam()">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 640 640"><!--!Font Awesome Free v7.2.0 by @fontawesome - https://fontawesome.com License - https://fontawesome.com/license/free Copyright 2026 Fonticons, Inc.--><path d="M187.2 100.9C174.8 94.1 159.8 94.4 147.6 101.6C135.4 108.8 128 121.9 128 136L128 504C128 518.1 135.5 531.2 147.6 538.4C159.7 545.6 174.8 545.9 187.2 539.1L523.2 355.1C536 348.1 544 334.6 544 320C544 305.4 536 291.9 523.2 284.9L187.2 100.9z"/></svg>
        </button>

        <div class="timer-display" id="timer-display">
            <div class="status-badge" id="status-badge">Ready</div>
            <div id="remaining">—</div>
            <div id="remaining-label" class="remaining-label">minutes remaining</div>

            <!-- end-time row with gear popover -->
            <div class="end-time-row" id="end-time-row">
                <div class="end-time-label">Ends at <strong id="end-time-val">—</strong></div>
                <button class="btn-gear" id="gear-btn" onclick="toggleGear()" title="Change end time">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                        viewBox="0 0 640 640"><!--!Font Awesome Free v7.2.0 by @fontawesome - https://fontawesome.com License - https://fontawesome.com/license/free Copyright 2026 Fonticons, Inc.-->
                        <path
                            d="M259.1 73.5C262.1 58.7 275.2 48 290.4 48L350.2 48C365.4 48 378.5 58.7 381.5 73.5L396 143.5C410.1 149.5 423.3 157.2 435.3 166.3L503.1 143.8C517.5 139 533.3 145 540.9 158.2L570.8 210C578.4 223.2 575.7 239.8 564.3 249.9L511 297.3C511.9 304.7 512.3 312.3 512.3 320C512.3 327.7 511.8 335.3 511 342.7L564.4 390.2C575.8 400.3 578.4 417 570.9 430.1L541 481.9C533.4 495 517.6 501.1 503.2 496.3L435.4 473.8C423.3 482.9 410.1 490.5 396.1 496.6L381.7 566.5C378.6 581.4 365.5 592 350.4 592L290.6 592C275.4 592 262.3 581.3 259.3 566.5L244.9 496.6C230.8 490.6 217.7 482.9 205.6 473.8L137.5 496.3C123.1 501.1 107.3 495.1 99.7 481.9L69.8 430.1C62.2 416.9 64.9 400.3 76.3 390.2L129.7 342.7C128.8 335.3 128.4 327.7 128.4 320C128.4 312.3 128.9 304.7 129.7 297.3L76.3 249.8C64.9 239.7 62.3 223 69.8 209.9L99.7 158.1C107.3 144.9 123.1 138.9 137.5 143.7L205.3 166.2C217.4 157.1 230.6 149.5 244.6 143.4L259.1 73.5zM320.3 400C364.5 399.8 400.2 363.9 400 319.7C399.8 275.5 363.9 239.8 319.7 240C275.5 240.2 239.8 276.1 240 320.3C240.2 364.5 276.1 400.2 320.3 400z" />
                    </svg>
                </button>
                <div class="end-time-popover" id="end-time-popover">
                    <div class="popover-label">Set new end time</div>
                    <div class="popover-row">
                        <input class="popover-input" type="time" step="1" id="end-time-input" />
                        <button class="btn-popover-set" onclick="applyEndTime()">Set</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="progress-wrap">
                <div id="progress-bar"></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div id="expired-msg"></div>
    </div>

    <hr class="h-rule" />

    <div class="instructions-block" id="instructions-block"></div>

</section>
```
